schema: numeric tolerance policy for artifact drift audit

decimal_tail_fields.purpose: stored decimal tail differences from Decimal.sqrt or formatting, not physical-output drift

notes: This policy supports schema/numeric reproducibility without claiming byte-for-byte release equality.
Field-specific tolerances can be added under fields when third-party diffs identify recurring deterministic decimal-tail differences.
Diagnostic references remain post-generation comparison values and may not be used in generator equations.
